title: Tax badge
description: Compact chip showing `<currency_symbol> <rate>% <name>` (e.g. `AED 5% VAT`, `£ 20% VAT`, `$ 0% Sales Tax`). Rendered in invoice detail + line items + the region list tax column + the region create/edit summary. When the tax_config carries multi-rate `rates[]`, a small badge overlay signals `+ N more`.
notes: Uses HeroUI `Chip` — no bespoke class-name literals per the ui-components rule.
The variant maps to tax posture: 0% renders as `neutral`, > 0% and ≤ 10% as `accent`, > 10% as `warning` (visual signal that it's a high-tax jurisdiction).
Rate formatting: 3-decimal precision from the API, rendered with locale-aware separator (e.g. `5,00%` in fr-FR, `5.00%` in en-US) via the sibling `formatPercent` helper.
When `hasCustomRates: true`, appends a small subscript `+N` chip inside the badge for at-a-glance multi-rate visibility.

hasCustomRates.description: True when tax_config.rates[] is non-empty. Renders a subscript `+N` chip.

customRatesCount.description: Number of custom rates in tax_config.rates[]. Only rendered when hasCustomRates=true.

showLabel.description: When false, renders just the numeric rate + symbol (compact tables).
